 {"id":"bd-3mxk","title":"Jobs: progress visualization polish","description":"Polish job progress visualization so it looks like a modern CI dashboard (compelling, readable, information-dense).

Why:
- Progress UI is where “toy” demos instantly reveal themselves.
- This task should make the Jobs page feel premium even in a plain terminal.

Requirements:
- Use `bubbles::progress` for determinate progress:
  - clear fill, percentage (optional), and label
  - themed colors that match status (running/success/fail/cancel)
- Use spinners for indeterminate states:
  - e.g., “waiting”, “queued”, “uploading”, “finalizing”
- Status clarity:
  - icons/chips for state
  - duration + ETA-ish hint when possible
  - differentiate “stuck” vs “slow” (e.g., warn color after threshold)
- Visual polish:
  - consistent spacing and alignment across rows
  - good behavior in narrow widths (truncate/wrap rules)
  - respects `--no-color` (still readable) and `--no-animations`

Optional (nice if it’s easy):
- Stage-based progress (build/test/deploy) with per-stage completion markers.

Acceptance:
- Looks like a real CI dashboard.
- Clear at a glance: what’s running, what’s blocked, what failed, what finished.

Testing:
- Unit tests:
  - rendering decisions given job state (spinner vs bar, colors/labels)
  - width-constrained rendering produces stable output
- E2E:
  - wizard -> jobs scenario should assert at least one running job shows an updating progress indicator.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"HazyRiver","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:10:23.217085325Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T23:52:54.759132044Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T23:52:54.759063957Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","jobs","progress"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3mxk","depends_on_id":"bd-1dr6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:04Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3mxk","depends_on_id":"bd-3rwl","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:04Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3mxk","depends_on_id":"bd-7jxu","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:04Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3nit","title":"E2E Tests: demo_showcase wizard workflow","description":"End-to-end tests for demo_showcase deployment wizard workflow.

## Purpose
Test the complete multi-step wizard deployment flow,
including validation, navigation, and completion.

## Test Requirements

### Wizard Flow
- [ ] Start wizard from page 7
- [ ] Step 1: Service name entry and validation
- [ ] Step 2: Service type selection
- [ ] Step 3: Environment selection
- [ ] Step 4: Environment variables
- [ ] Step 5: Review and confirmation
- [ ] Deployment progress display
- [ ] Completion notification

### Validation
- [ ] Empty service name rejected
- [ ] Invalid characters rejected
- [ ] Required selections enforced
- [ ] Clear error messages displayed

### Navigation
- [ ] Next/previous step buttons work
- [ ] Can go back and modify earlier steps
- [ ] Cancel abandons wizard
- [ ] Keyboard shortcuts work

### Integration
- [ ] Deployment triggers job creation
- [ ] Job visible in Jobs page
- [ ] Logs generated in Logs page
- [ ] Dashboard metrics update

## Logging Requirements
- [ ] Log each wizard step transition
- [ ] Log validation attempts/results
- [ ] Log deployment progress events
- [ ] Full form state at submission

## Success Criteria
- Complete wizard flow works E2E
- Validation prevents bad input
- Deployment integrates across pages","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"DustyMeadow","created_at":"2026-01-28T18:54:41.429691632Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T22:47:18.140714726Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T22:47:18.140585715Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","e2e","testing","wizard"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3nit","depends_on_id":"bd-1cgb","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:04Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3nit","depends_on_id":"bd-28kk","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:04Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3nit","depends_on_id":"bd-t1aq","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:04Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3nrc","title":"E2E: CLI script wrapper for CI + local debugging","description":"Add a human-friendly script that runs the *smoke* E2E suite with good logs.

Deliverables:
- `scripts/demo_showcase_e2e.sh` (or similar) that:
  - sets deterministic env (seed, no-color optional)
  - runs `cargo test -p demo_showcase` with clear output
  - on failure, prints where artifacts were written

Notes:
- The full scenario suite is added by a follow-up task so we get early value.

Acceptance:
- Running the script locally gives a fast, reliable signal and high-quality failure output.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"GoldPeak","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:32:40.876265868Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T23:10:48.312144629Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T23:10:48.312053609Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","e2e","script","test"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3nrc","depends_on_id":"bd-299e","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:04Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3nrc","depends_on_id":"bd-4d5e","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:04Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3nrc","depends_on_id":"bd-pfqw","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:04Z","created_by":"import"}]}

 {"id":"bd-3nyf","title":"EPIC: Integration Test Coverage","description":"Integration tests that verify cross-crate behavior and real terminal interaction.

## Philosophy
- Test how crates work together
- Test actual terminal I/O where possible
- Verify ANSI escape sequence correctness
- Test across different terminal capabilities

## Key Integration Points
1. bubbletea + bubbles - components in event loop
2. bubbletea + lipgloss - styled output rendering
3. glamour + lipgloss - markdown with styles
4. huh + bubbletea - form in TUI context
5. charmed_log + any - logging integration

## Test Infrastructure Needs
- Terminal emulator/PTY test harness
- ANSI sequence capture and verification
- Cross-platform terminal capability detection
- Timing-sensitive test handling","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-01-28T18:50:41.653513760Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-30T03:41:48.055605619Z","closed_at":"2026-01-30T03:41:48.055536200Z","close_reason":"Completed: All child integration test tasks closed (bd-97j0 Terminal I/O, bd-o39u bubbletea+bubbles, bd-2zkx cross-platform, bd-xn0u huh+bubbletea, bd-366a glamour+lipgloss). Integration test coverage complete.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3nyf","depends_on_id":"bd-665u","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:04Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3o6n","title":"QA and Stabilization Session: wish, lipgloss, glamour, huh","description":"Completed a deep dive review and fix cycle for the codebase.

Fixed:
- wish: Output flushing, bubbletea integration, input handling.
- lipgloss: Theme initialization bugs, missing error types.
- glamour: Table rendering (replaced naive implementation with table.rs), updated tests.
- huh: Doc examples, missing helper methods for value extraction.
- charmed_log: Date math (migrated to chrono).

Verified:
- All crates compile cleanly.
- Tests pass for all modified crates.
- Workspace check passes.

Closed related epics/tasks.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-19T23:46:22.301048189Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-19T23:46:29.525183754Z","closed_at":"2026-01-19T23:46:29.525106669Z","close_reason":"Completed","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-3pf0","title":"Unit Tests: glow file browser and utility functions","description":"Add external unit tests for glow crate covering: FileBrowser Model update/view lifecycle, navigation edge cases (empty dirs, boundary conditions), filter mode toggling, recursive scanning, format_size edge cases, truncate_string with wide unicode, pad_display_width behavior.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"BrightGorge","created_at":"2026-01-29T04:47:18.184124675Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-29T04:50:27.500120409Z","closed_at":"2026-01-29T04:50:27.500052272Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3pf0","depends_on_id":"bd-28co","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:04Z","created_by":"import"}]}
